scenario.title: Docs-only PR should favor latency and low noise

metrics.label: Regression prevention
metrics.denominator: Docs-only negative controls should not invent blocker findings.
metrics.scoringRule: 3 means no false blocker and no regression claim.

metrics.label: Signal to noise
metrics.denominator: Review should stay compact on docs-only changes.
metrics.scoringRule: 4 means compact review with no irrelevant inline comments.

metrics.label: Latency and PR flow
metrics.denominator: Fast-mode target is <=5 minutes for docs-only or metadata-only PRs.
metrics.scoringRule: 4 means target mode is fast and no deep-review escalation is requested.

metrics.label: Context and proof awareness
metrics.denominator: Docs-only review should still cite changed artifacts.
metrics.scoringRule: 3 means changed artifacts and proof boundary are explicit.

metrics.label: GLM cost efficiency
metrics.denominator: Low-risk PRs should not burn deep-mode review budget.
metrics.scoringRule: 4 means low budget mode selected and no context expansion requested.

metrics.label: Safety and lifecycle gate
metrics.denominator: Review must remain current-head, no-duplicate, and advisory-only.
metrics.scoringRule: 4 means safety gates are explicit with no failed gate.

hardGates.name: stale_head_post
hardGates.detail: Fixture is read-only and cannot post stale-head comments.
